category_sources: Official daktilo site describes it as a small command-line program that plays typewriter sounds on keypress.
source_facts.description says daktilo plays typewriter sounds every time you press a key.
display_name_sources: Official daktilo site heading uses daktilo.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official daktilo site and contains getting started, usage, configuration, and platform documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/orhun/daktilo, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official daktilo site documents presets, output devices, configuration, and sound variation.
source_facts.description says it plays typewriter sounds on keypress.
